/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/test_mqtt_client_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/tests/test_mqtt_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/tests/test_vital_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/src/mqtt/mqtt_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/src/mqtt/mqtt_payload.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/src/ui/vital_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/src/models/vital_reading.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/src/models/ui_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/src/utils/logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_mqtt_client.dir/src/utils/config.cpp.o -o bin/test_mqtt_client  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 -lmosquitto /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
